errors.slugTaken: This service slug is already taken in the current Space
errors.secretLeaked: Please remove the real token and use the placeholder before submitting
errors.forbidden: You are not allowed to modify this MCP
errors.notFound: MCP not found or has been removed
errors.invalidVisibility: Visibility must be Public or Only me
errors.probeUnsupported: Server cannot probe this transport (stdio must run in the desktop client)
errors.unauthorized: Session expired, please sign in again
errors.forbiddenSpace: You are not a member of this space
errors.internal: Server is busy, please try again later

list.desc: Browse and connect MCP servers to extend your agent's tools.

detail.title: MCP Details
detail.tokenHint: Replace the <把这里换成你的 Token> placeholder in the config with your own token before use.

delete.confirmBody: It will disappear from the market. Any configs already copied out will keep working.

create.title: New MCP
create.sectionBasicsDesc: Shown on the market card and detail header
create.sectionConnectDesc: How the MCP server is launched and reached
create.sectionToolsDesc: The tools your agents will be able to call
create.sectionExamplesDesc: Show how a user might invoke this MCP (optional)
create.emptyExamples: No examples yet. Click "+ Add" in the top right to add one.
create.emptyFaqs: No FAQs yet. Click "+ Add" in the top right to add one.
create.emptyNotes: No notes yet. Click "+ Add" in the top right to add one.
create.name: Name
create.slugHint: Used as the key in the generated mcpServers JSON; lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only. Leave blank to derive it from the name.
create.argTooLong: Each command argument must be at most {{max}} characters
create.headerKeyTooLong: Each header name must be at most {{max}} characters
create.headerValueTooLong: Each header value must be at most {{max}} characters
create.iconUploadFailed: Icon upload failed, please try again
create.sloganPlaceholder: One line describing what this MCP does
create.headersHint: Format: Header-Name: value, one per line
create.iconHint: png / jpg / gif; or keep the default emoji
create.usageExamplePlaceholder: Show how a user would invoke this MCP

probeError.command_not_found: Launch command not found. Please check the command.
probeError.timeout: Probe timed out. Please try again later.
probeError.init_failed: Connection config is incomplete; cannot fetch the tool list.
probeError.no_tools_capability: This MCP does not expose a tool list.

create.toolsEmpty: No tools yet. Click "Test / fetch tools" to probe automatically, or add them manually.
create.toolsHint: Click "Test / fetch tools" to probe the remote server and sync its tool list.
